interaction.singleClick: MouseBridge emits click; PetRuntime delays by petting.clickDelayMs, enters PettingBehavior, plays happy, then returns to previous behavior.
interaction.doubleClick: MouseBridge emits dblclick; PetRuntime cancels pending single-click reaction and requests JumpBehavior.
interaction.rightClick: MouseBridge emits contextmenu with cursor coordinates; PetRuntime calls window.electronAPI.showPetContextMenu.
interaction.dragStart: MouseBridge emits mouse:down only after pointer movement crosses the drag threshold, preventing normal clicks from entering drag/fall first.
interaction.contextMenu: src/platform/pet-context-menu-ipc.ts builds Electron Menu entries: Exit, Hide 30min, Settings.

scheduler.runtimeIntegration: PetRuntime starts BehaviorScheduler and calls update(dt) on each step; click and drag interactions call pauseAfterInteraction().
